'''Arboga''' was a gravelly-voiced [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]]. In the chaos that followed the [[Second Battle of Coruscant|Imperial retaking of Coruscant]] after [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] death, Arboga served as the [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding officer]] of the [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 ''Liberty'' type Star Cruiser]] [[Hope (MC80 Star Cruiser)|''Hope'']].<ref name="Retreat from Coruscant" />
